description: Trust kernel for fleets of AI agents: verifies what an agent actually shipped from git evidence, arbitrates concurrent file access with leases, and refuses with structured reasons — never believing the agent's self-report.
rules: Install with `pip install dos-kernel` — the bare `dos` name on PyPI is an unrelated package; the import name is still `dos`.
Start with `dos quickstart` — a 60-second demo where the kernel catches a fabricated 'done' claim.
Verdicts come from git ancestry and environment read-backs, never from agent narration; do not work around a refusal by trusting the agent's own report.
Wire into an agent runtime with `dos init --hooks claude` (also codex, gemini, cursor, opencode, cowork) or install the bundled claude-plugin.
